Wave 1 Task 3 (601b98d): not_imported now uses the importer's own find_duplicates + _dedup_within_batch (30s LRU-bounded per-folder cache); run_job snapshots its output tree and hands auto_import only the files it produced.

Wave 1 Task 3 (601b98d): not_imported now uses the importer's own find_duplicates + _dedup_within_batch (30s LRU-bounded per-folder cache); run_job snapshots its output tree and hands auto_import only the files it produced.

Wave 2 (merged 4baa6a1): full-bleed DJ page + sortable/composing filters + genre column (B); BPM chart decoupled from energy, seam tooltips, runtime, autosave, bounded undo (C); self-explaining status strip with unmounted!=missing (F). 82 frontend tests green.

Wave 3 Task 7 (b8017c5 + fixes): setfile.py writes m3u8 + JSON sidecar; to_rekordbox_xml emits a DJ_PLAYLISTS collection with percent-encoded file://localhost Locations; /api/dj/export/{m3u8,xml} are read-only — no master.db, no rekordbox-running guard. Review found and fixed: silent clobber on sanitized-name collision, m3u8 directive injection via interior newline in tags.

Waves 1-4 (pushed through crate-v3): file_state + genre + energy states + import scoping (W1); full-bleed browser, sort/filter, BPM-independent chart, seams, runtime, autosave, undo, status strip (W2); m3u8/XML zero-write export + duplicates screen (W3); range-request audition endpoint (W4). All adversarially reviewed; review findings fixed (setfile clobber+injection, hidden fuzzy sibling, load_tracks memo).

Wave 5 Task 10 (54ef3aa, reviewed clean): saved sets on disk (m3u8 + JSON sidecar), id-first/path-fallback resolution with unresolved entries reported, rekordbox playlist mapping (re-export makes a NEW uniquified playlist), read-only playlist read-in to fork from. Delete removes only Crate's own files; traversal boundary re-asserted on every name-taking endpoint.

Wave 6 Task 11 (9933243, reviewed clean): POST /api/dj/suggest ranks against the last slot via rate_transition; dj.key_relation() names the harmonic relationship and provably mirrors harmonic_score branch-for-branch, so suggestion reasoning can never contradict the seam colors. Recommends only — no auto-order, no auto-add (guarded by test).

Wave 7 Task 12 (7ae5463): dnd-kit KeyboardSensor for set reorder, focusable Camelot wheel segments, keyboard-operable JobCard, accessible names on icon-only controls; verified aria-sort headers, focus-visible tooltips, Radix focus trap, reduced-motion kill-switch, nothing-by-color-alone across every screen. sdl-jzw's last item (Save debounce after success) landed in Wave 2's SaveSetDialog. The polish pass also found and fixed three real bugs: duplicate pasted URLs downloading twice, deleting a cron mid-edit orphaning the edit state, and clearing 'every N hours' serializing every=0.
